subject: fix(audit): Phases 2-4, 6 — docs, security, debug logs, code quality
body:
Phase 2 — Documentation:
- SESSION_NOTES.md: rewrite with current session state
- USER_GUIDE.md: update reset filters (no X button, use "All" + radius dropdown)
- CLAUDE.md: add generate-theme-colors.mjs, update header layout, add new status items
- HISTORY.md: add 2026-04-02 entries for all recent changes

Phase 3 — Security:
- +html.tsx: add Content-Security-Policy meta tag (restrict origins, allow unsafe-inline
  for PWA install script + RNW inline styles)
- admin/station/[id].tsx: add maxLength to all TextInput fields (200/100/500/100/50)
- admin/bulk-import.tsx: add maxLength=5MB to JSON textarea

Phase 4 — Debug logs (10 missing → 0):
- admin/station/[id].tsx: log station save success/failure
- admin/bulk-update.tsx: log bulk price update success/failure
- admin/bulk-import.tsx: log bulk import success/failure
- useLocation.ts: log manual location set
- StationList.tsx: log sort mode toggle
- useTheme.ts: log meta theme-color update

Phase 6 — Code quality:
- usePriceHistory.ts: fix loading race — always clear loading in finally block
- config.ts: add shared MODAL_TOP_MARGIN constant
- HeaderFilters.tsx, index.tsx, BurgerMenu.tsx: use MODAL_TOP_MARGIN (DRY)
- Toast listener cleanup and blur timer already correctly implemented (verified)

Tags: audit, docs, security, debug, code-quality
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: audit-sweep
Semver: patch

title: Phases 2-4, 6 — docs, security, debug logs, code quality
